summary: Improve demo/README with a one-command reproducible setup and clear demo/runbook docs while preserving existing loopback-only safety defaults and guidance.
commandsToRun: apply_patch <patch updating README sections for one-command setup and demo steps>
testsToRun: Run documented one-command setup from a clean shell and verify dependencies/bootstrap complete successfully.
Execute demo command exactly as documented and verify expected local-only behavior.
Validate docs preserve and explicitly state loopback-only/default dry-run constraints (no public exposure changes).
Smoke-check copied commands for correctness (no missing env vars, paths, or flags).
rollbackPlan: Revert README edits with git restore demo/README.md README.md.
Re-run previous documented flow to confirm baseline behavior restored.
If any safety wording was altered, reintroduce explicit loopback-only and dry-run defaults before re-merging.
digestBullets: Added a one-command reproducible setup path in demo docs.
Clarified end-to-end demo/runbook steps for faster local verification.
Kept loopback-only safety posture untouched and explicitly documented.
Included quick validation guidance to ensure commands work from a clean environment.
